mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_conversation_turn ( scan_id, session_id, employee_id, turn_index, start_message_id, end_message_id, start_time, end_time, user_input, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_tokens, total_cost, tool_calls_count, tool_calls_success, tool_calls_error, skill_calls_count, skill_calls_success, skill_calls_error, is_complete, has_error, status, total_duration_ms, tool_duration_ms, model_duration_ms, chain_summary, log_file_path, quality_status, system_turn ) VALUES ( #{scanId}, #{sessionId}, #{employeeId}, #{turnIndex}, #{startMessageId}, #{endMessageId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{userInput}, #{totalInputTokens}, #{totalOutputTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{totalCost}, #{toolCallsCount}, #{toolCallsSuccess}, #{toolCallsError}, #{skillCallsCount}, #{skillCallsSuccess}, #{skillCallsError}, #{isComplete}, #{hasError}, #{status}, #{totalDurationMs}, #{toolDurationMs}, #{modelDurationMs}, #{chainSummary}, #{logFilePath}, #{qualityStatus}, #{systemTurn} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE end_message_id = VALUES(end_message_id), end_time = VALUES(end_time), total_input_tokens = VALUES(total_input_tokens), total_output_tokens = VALUES(total_output_tokens), total_tokens = VALUES(total_tokens), total_cost = VALUES(total_cost), tool_calls_count = VALUES(tool_calls_count), tool_calls_success = VALUES(tool_calls_success), tool_calls_error = VALUES(tool_calls_error), skill_calls_count = VALUES(skill_calls_count), skill_calls_success = VALUES(skill_calls_success), skill_calls_error = VALUES(skill_calls_error), is_complete = VALUES(is_complete), has_error = VALUES(has_error), status = VALUES(status), total_duration_ms = VALUES(total_duration_ms), tool_duration_ms = VALUES(tool_duration_ms), model_duration_ms = VALUES(model_duration_ms), chain_summary = VALUES(chain_summary), system_turn = VALUES(system_turn)

INSERT IGNORE INTO dashboard_conversation_turn ( scan_id, session_id, employee_id, turn_index, start_message_id, end_message_id, start_time, end_time, user_input, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_tokens, total_cost, tool_calls_count, tool_calls_success, tool_calls_error, skill_calls_count, skill_calls_success, skill_calls_error, is_complete, has_error, status, total_duration_ms, tool_duration_ms, model_duration_ms, chain_summary, log_file_path, quality_status, system_turn ) VALUES
( #{turn.scanId}, #{turn.sessionId}, #{turn.employeeId}, #{turn.turnIndex}, #{turn.startMessageId}, #{turn.endMessageId}, #{turn.startTime}, #{turn.endTime}, #{turn.userInput}, #{turn.totalInputTokens}, #{turn.totalOutputTokens}, #{turn.totalTokens}, #{turn.totalCost}, #{turn.toolCallsCount}, #{turn.toolCallsSuccess}, #{turn.toolCallsError}, #{turn.skillCallsCount}, #{turn.skillCallsSuccess}, #{turn.skillCallsError}, #{turn.isComplete}, #{turn.hasError}, #{turn.status}, #{turn.totalDurationMs}, #{turn.toolDurationMs}, #{turn.modelDurationMs}, #{turn.chainSummary}, #{turn.logFilePath}, #{turn.qualityStatus}, #{turn.systemTurn} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dashboard_conversation_turn WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY start_time
SELECT * FROM dashboard_conversation_turn ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM dashboard_conversation_turn WHERE system_turn = 0 OR system_turn IS NULL ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM dashboard_conversation_turn WHERE start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time <= #{endTime} AND (system_turn = 0 OR system_turn IS NULL) ORDER BY start_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dashboard_conversation_turn WHERE scan_id = #{scanId} AND has_error = 1 AND (system_turn = 0 OR system_turn IS NULL)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dashboard_conversation_turn WHERE start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time <= #{endTime} AND has_error = 1 AND (system_turn = 0 OR system_turn IS NULL)
